props.name: as
props.description: Component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.

props.name: chips
props.description: Renders chips from data instead of the default slot. Each item is a string or an object with a `value`, an optional `label`, and any `CChip` props. The slot is used when this is omitted.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables every chip rendered by the component.

props.name: filter
props.description: Turns the chips into filter chips, each showing a leading check icon while selected.

props.name: removable
props.description: Displays a remove button on every chip rendered by the component.

props.name: removeIcon
props.description: Replaces the default remove icon on every chip with a custom icon node.

props.name: selectable
props.description: Enables selection behavior for the chips rendered by the component.

props.name: selected
props.description: The selected chip values passed using `v-model:selected`.

props.name: selectedIcon
props.description: Replaces the default selected icon shown by filter chips with a custom icon node.

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Sets how many chips can be selected at once.

events.name: remove
events.description: Event occurs when a chip requests removal, with its value.

events.name: select
events.description: Event occurs when the selected chip values change.

events.name: update:chips
events.description: Emit the chips without the removed one (for `v-model:chips`).

events.name: update:selected
events.description: Emit the new selected values whenever the selection changes (for `v-model:selected`).
